arabic: أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أُبَدِّلَ بَعْضَ الْيُورُوهَاتِ إِلَى الْجُنَيْهِ الْمِصْرِيِّ. ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الصَّرَّافَةِ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ. سَأَلْتُ عَنْ سِعْرِ صَرْفِ الْيُورُو الْيَوْمَ. أَعْطَانِي الصَّرَّافُ السِّعْرَ الْحَالِيَّ وَعَدَّ لِيَ الْمَبْلَغَ بِعِنَايَةٍ. أَخَذْتُ الْمَالَ وَشَكَرْتُهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ أَغَادِرَ.
translation: Htio sam zamijeniti nekoliko eura u egipatske funte. Otišao sam u mjenjačnicu u centru grada. Pitao sam koji je danas kurs eura. Mjenjač mi je dao trenutni kurs i pažljivo izbrojao iznos. Uzeo sam novac i zahvalio mu se prije nego što sam otišao.
translationEn: I wanted to exchange some euros into Egyptian pounds. I went to the currency exchange office in the city centre. I asked what the euro exchange rate was today. The cashier gave me the current rate and carefully counted out the amount. I took the money and thanked him before leaving.
